channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Quantum pioneers win Turing Award for encryption breakthrough
item.description: [BBC Technology] It is hoped Charles H Bennett and Gilles Brassard's work will make digital communications secure for decades ahead.

item.title: Government backtracks on AI and copyright after outcry from major artists
item.description: [BBC Technology] However, the government's position is now unclear, saying it "no longer has a preferred option" for what to do next.

item.title: 3 ways to reduce bias in AI with better context
item.description: [MarTech] AI bias often starts before the model runs. Missing context, flawed prompts and assumptions distort outputs. Here's how to correct them. The post 3 ways to reduce bias in AI with better context appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Middle managers are the missing link in AI adoption
item.description: [MarTech] Executives set the vision and teams test tools, but transformation happens in the middle. Equip managers to drive AI-powered workflow change. The post Middle managers are the missing link in AI adoption appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 8点1氪丨贾国龙推出新品牌“天边砂锅焖面”；涨价4000元，新一代小米SU7起售价21.99万元；麦当劳回应卖蛋挞
item.description:
[36氪] 今日热点导览
ZARA、H&M、拉夫劳伦等，被海关总署点名通报 腾讯股价大跌原因：加大AI投入或削减回购 欧盟证实：马斯克X缴纳1.2亿欧元罚款 中国移动“移动梦网”等业务将下线 现货黄金跌破4700美元 腾讯回应在美游戏投资
TOP 3大新闻 贾国龙新品牌做焖面，人均消费40元至50元 西贝餐饮集团创始人、董事长贾国龙的最新创业项目“天边砂锅焖面”已在北京798艺术区悄然落地，这家新店2月13日开业，人均消费40元至50元，主打品类是贾国龙家乡内蒙古巴盟特色的砂锅焖面。贾国龙向记者透露，西贝要关一部分店，他希望有个新品牌能够

item.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: Nvidia’s ‘Super Bowl of AI,’ Tesla Disappoints, and Meta’s VR Metaverse ‘Shutdown’
item.description: [WIRED AI] In this episode, we dive into Nvidia’s annual developer conference and what CEO Jensen Huang is saying about the future of the company.

item.title: A rogue AI led to a serious security incident at Meta
item.description: [The Verge AI] For almost two hours last week, Meta employees had unauthorized access to company and user data thanks to an AI agent that gave an employee inaccurate technical advice, as previously reported by The Information. Meta spokesperson Tracy Clayton said in a statement to The Verge that "no user data was

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] AI is delivering its clearest ROI so far not in marketing, but in fraud, where criminals are scaling persuasion faster and more effectively than most businesses. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: ActiveCampaign extends its AI capabilities with context and scale
item.description: [MarTech] ActiveCampaign’s new AI tools alert you to what’s working in your campaigns and beyond and how to fix what isn’t — no prompting required. The post ActiveCampaign extends its AI capabilities with context and scale appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: AI is reshaping what entry-level marketing work looks like
item.description: [MarTech] AI is transforming entry-level marketing roles from execution to oversight, forcing teams to rethink how junior talent contributes and grows. The post AI is reshaping what entry-level marketing work looks like appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Amazon's Alexa has had an AI upgrade. Now she's got more to say
item.description: [BBC Technology] There has been criticism the Echo has stagnated, while other AI chatbots have become much easier to communicate with.

item.title: China AI startup Moonshot snags funds at US$18 billion valuation
item.description: [Business Times] [BEIJING] Moonshot AI is seeking to raise as much as US$1 billion in an expanded funding round that would value the startup...

item.title: US Commerce Department withdraws planned rule on AI chip exports
item.description: [Business Times] [NEW YORK] The US Commerce Department withdrew a planned rule on artificial intelligence (AI) chip exports on Friday (Mar 13), the latest...

item.title: The price isn’t right: Oil spike fuels risks in South-east Asia’s tech scene
item.description: [Business Times] RISING oil prices triggered by the ongoing war in the Middle East could quickly drive up operating costs within South-east Asia’s tech...

item.title: There Aren't a Lot of Reasons to Get Excited About a New Amazon Smartphone
item.description: [WIRED AI] The company is reportedly building a new AI-powered mobile device. If Amazon follows through on the plan, experts warn it would be next to impossible to break into a crowded market.

item.title: Sezzle dismisses auditor Baker Tilly, appoints PwC for 2026
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Microsoft rolls back some of its Copilot AI bloat on Windows
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The company is reducing Copilot entry points on Windows, starting with Photos, Widgets, Notepad, and other apps.

item.title: Iran-linked hackers restore website after US seizes domains
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: What happened at Nvidia GTC: NemoClaw, Robot Olaf, and a $1 trillion bet
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at Nvidia’s GTC conference this week in his signature leather jacket to deliver a two-and-a-half-hour keynote, projecting $1 trillion in AI chip sales through 2027, declaring that every company needs an “OpenClaw strategy,” and closing w

item.title: Cyber actors linked to Russia targeting users of messaging apps, FBI says
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Nvidia has an OpenClaw strategy. Do you?
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at Nvidia’s GTC conference this week in his signature leather jacket to deliver a two-and-a-half-hour keynote, projecting $1 trillion in AI chip sales through 2027, declaring that every company needs an “OpenClaw strategy,” and closing w

item.title: Gamers Hate Nvidia's DLSS 5. Developers Aren’t Crazy About It, Either
item.description: [WIRED AI] Nvidia’s new AI upscaling gaming technology struck gamers as uncanny and off-putting. Developers don't seem to like it, either, but it could be “the default” in a few years.

item.title: AI's demand for data could cause tight storage chip supplies, Solidigm executive says
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Trump takes another shot at dismantling state AI regulation
item.description: [The Verge AI] The Trump administration on Friday unveiled its new legislative blueprint for AI regulation, and the seven-point plan includes a clear message: The federal government should avoid many AI regulations beyond a set of child safety rules, and it should bar states from messing with the "national strateg

item.title: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
item.description: [BBC Technology] The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

item.title: WordPress.com now lets AI agents write and publish posts, and more
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] New AI agents on WordPress.com could lower barriers to publishing while increasing machine-generated content across the web.

item.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
item.description: [BBC Technology] The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

item.title: Trump’s AI framework targets state laws, shifts child safety burden to parents
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Trump’s AI framework pushes federal preemption of state laws, emphasizes innovation, and shifts responsibility for child safety toward parents while laying out lighter-touch rules for tech companies.

item.title: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
item.description: [BBC Technology] Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.

item.title: At Palantir’s Developer Conference, AI Is Built to Win Wars
item.description: [WIRED AI] As business soars, Palantir is doubling down on a vision of AI built for battlefield advantage—and attracting customers who agree.

item.title: Walmart says ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than its own website
item.description: [MarTech] Walmart’s test shows AI-driven checkout may simplify buying, but it still converts far worse than traditional ecommerce experiences. The post Walmart says ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than its own website appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 万物云：与万科关联应收账款余额仅剩20.6亿，业务独立性持续增强
item.description:
[36氪] 3月19日晚间，万物云空间科技服务股份有限公司发布2025年度业绩报告。报告期内，万物云实现营业收入372.7亿元，同比增长2.7%，剔除开发商相关业务后，营收同比增长8.4%；核心净利润约21.3亿元，同比微增0.8%；归母净利润7.7亿元，同比出现较大幅度下滑。
业绩发布会现场 万物云董事长朱保全在业绩发布会上表示，关联开发商（万科）产生的坏账及资产摊销所带来的负向影响是利润下滑的主要原因，2025年全年因此产生了7.4亿元的净利润负影响，这是一个“被动”的发生过程，但报告期内公司持续关联交易收入同比降低11.97亿元，占比已进一步下降至6%，占比持续下降，独立性越来越强。

item.title: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines
item.description: [The Verge AI] Since roughly the turn of the millennium, Google Search has been the bedrock of the web. People loved Google's trustworthy "10 blue links" search experience and its unspoken promise: The website you click is the website you get. Now, Google is beginning to replace news headlines in its search result

item.title: Amazon is making an Alexa phone
item.description: [The Verge AI] Over 10 years after shelving the Fire Phone, Amazon is reportedly planning to launch another smartphone, this time focused on Alexa. According to Reuters, the phone, which is code-named "Transformer," will center around Amazon's AI assistant, but Alexa won't "necessarily be the primary operating sys

item.title: Why people really hate AI
item.description: [The Verge AI] There's a big, and increasing, disconnect in culture right now when it comes to artificial intelligence. Companies of all shapes and sizes are hunting for places to deploy AI and can't stop talking about how this new technology will change everything. But when you ask people about AI, the consistent

item.title: Tesla expects Dutch decision on self-driving technology by April 10
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Ecolab to buy CoolIT for $4.75 billion to tap into AI data center boom
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: The best AI investment might be in energy tech
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Power has become one of the biggest bottlenecks in rolling out new AI data centers. That's creating an opening for investors.

item.title: 宇树科技IPO受理：营收17亿元、利润6亿元，王兴兴控制近7成表决权
item.description: [钛媒体] 2025年度，宇树科技营收同比增长了335.36%，扣非净利润同比增长了674.29%。

item.title: Unitree plans 4.2 billion yuan Shanghai IPO, testing interest in humanoid robots
item.description: [Business Times] IPO is one of China’s biggest domestic tech listings in years

item.title: 阿里惊魂：电商触顶，AI成“全村的希望”
item.description: [钛媒体] “大象”转身，举步维艰。

item.title: Tencent Cloud Achieves Scaled Profitability for First Time in 2025
item.description: [钛媒体] There had previously been a widespread belief across the industry that “AI investment goes hand in hand with heavy losses,” but the figures in this Tencent earnings report told a different story.

item.title: I Learned More Than I Thought I Would From Using Food-Tracking Apps
item.description: [WIRED AI] These apps, some of which use AI and computer vision, were helpful for meeting my caloric and nutrition intake goals. But they also gave me some anxiety.

item.title: How a Vietnamese beauty startup landed a US$38 million exit
item.description: [Business Times] The Skinetiq deal with Marico draws widespread coverage, marking a rare startup exit in Vietnam

item.title: My AI Agent ‘Cofounder’ Conquered LinkedIn. Then It Got Banned
item.description: [WIRED AI] When social media is constantly pushing people to use AI, why not let AI agents participate?

item.title: 沙特土豪超60亿美元收购沐瞳：公司架构不变，张云帆仍是CEO
item.description: [36氪] 3月20日，沐瞳科技发布公司内部信，宣布公司已被沙特阿拉伯主权财富基金全资控股的游戏巨头Savvy Games Group（简称Savvy）收购。 自字节游戏业务调整后，这场交易就早有传闻，去年底已经有了大致轮廓。双方在2025下半年正式启动谈判，并在2026年初围绕核心条款达成共识，最后Savvy以超60亿美元的价格收购沐瞳的全部股权。 这场交易距离字节收购沐瞳只有5年——彼时的收购价格为40亿美元，如果考虑到谈判和双方讨论时间，这个出售间隔可能更短。 而从内部信来看，此次交易后，沐瞳的管理结构仍旧保持不变，张云帆会继续担任沐瞳CEO。在此基础上，公司还会针对员工的历史贡献及未来

item.title: 在大模型这件事上，雷军居然给马斯克打样了
item.description: [钛媒体] 论大模型，马斯克确实该拜雷军为师。

item.title: 阿里：电商再沦陷，AI才是大救星
item.description: [钛媒体] 核心电商板块的增长显著放缓，欣慰之处是阿里云的增长还是比较强劲的

item.title: 求购Anthropic老股份额；求购多家机器人公司老股份额｜资情留言板第181期
item.description: [36氪] 资产交易市场，信息瞬息万变，消息真假难辨，即使买卖双方花费大量的时间、精力，推动成交往往困难重重。为了能够帮助买卖双方更快速链接市场信息和潜在交易对手，避免不必要的投入与浪费，我们特地打造了这样一档栏目。 本文是这个栏目的第181期。如果你对本文提到的相关的交易线索感兴趣，希望接触这些潜在的交易对手，或者如果你手中直接握有希望交易的资金或者资产，欢迎与我们联系。（邮箱：zcjy@36kr.com）  一、本月新增 1、求购Anthropic老股份额（预期估值面议） 交易价格：预期估值面议 资产规模：约5000万-1亿美元 交易方式：直接老股交易，可以接受进入结

item.title: Work from home, avoid air travel to deal with higher energy prices, IEA says
item.description: [Straits Times] The IEA agreed on March 11 to release a record 400 million barrels of oil from strategic stockpiles.

item.title: May 16 InvestMe event: Retire With More Money
item.description: [Straits Times] Retirement planning is not as tough as you think if you know the simple rules on how you can aim to be financially free.

item.title: Alibaba, Tencent shed $84 billion after AI vision falls flat
item.description: [Straits Times] The market punished Alibaba and Tencent for failing to lay out clear visions for how to profit off AI.

item.title: Strong hiring demand for engineers, tech specialists in S’pore as newly created roles climb in 2025
item.description: [Straits Times] The rate of retrenchment among Singaporeans and permanent resident professionals rose to 10.1 per 1,000 employees.

item.title: 从能力到商品：Skills市场正在重塑开发者的生产方式
item.description:
[36氪] 技能是产业竞争力的重要体现方式之一 。在上海，一场 AI 时代的技能革命也在悄然展开——进入 2026 年，新赛季的竞争不再是大模型间的参数比拼，而是谁能真正走进工厂、实验室和写字楼，变成“会做事”的生产力工具。开源项目 OpenClaw 的迅速走红，折射出以 Skills 市场等形式的开放共享的新趋势——或许正是那把撬开这场 Agent 变革的锁钥。 简言之， Skills 市场是智能体的“技能商店”：开发者将专业能力封装为标准化模块，供全球智能体按需调用。这是开发工具的升级， 更是生产关系的深层重构。 
从“大模型”到“智能体”：AI的价值在于极致落地 理解 S

item.title: China starts year with fastest increase in spending since 2022
item.description: [Straits Times] The move is likely an effort by the authorities to fortify the economy in the face of rising external uncertainty.

item.title: 港中文95后博士、OPPO员工做了款AI可穿戴硬件，要成为用户全天候情感导师｜硬氪首发
item.description: [36氪] 作者｜黄楠 编辑｜袁斯来 硬氪获悉，深圳十镜科技有限公司（以下简称“十镜科技”）近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，本轮由元禾原点投资，融资资金将主要用于核心技术研发、产品结构迭代优化及小批量量产落地。首款产品Spiro计划于 2026年4月在北美独立站上线、6月量产。 十镜科技成立于2025年7月，创始人兼CEO赵之赫是一名95后连续创业者，博士毕业于香港中文大学，他曾出任智能穿戴硬件企业物启科技CEO，并推出全球首款AI情绪吊坠Nuna。联合创始人曾任职于大疆、安克、OPPO等企业，拥有多年的产品落地经验与成熟的市场化运作能力。 智能穿戴行业正经历一场隐性的代际更替。过去

item.title: Singapore-based energy firm Sinolam files arbitration request against Panama
item.description: [Straits Times] The arbitration is based on the Panama-Singapore Free Trade Agreement, Sinolam said.

item.title: OpenAI is planning a desktop ‘superapp’
item.description: [The Verge AI] OpenAI is working on a desktop "superapp" that merges its ChatGPT app, the Codex AI coding app, and its AI-powered Atlas browser into one app, The Wall Street Journal reports. The company is making the change as part of an effort to simplify its various product efforts, according to a memo cited by
